advice.title: You broke the build often
advice.body: You broke the build on 4/8 checkpoints (50%). Frequent breakage masks the source of new failures and forces you to debug stale code alongside new code.

advice.title: Long stretch without committing
advice.body: Your longest run without a commit was 8 checkpoints. Smaller, more frequent commits give you restore points and keep PR diffs reviewable.

advice.title: Process score fell over the session
advice.body: Your process score fell from 50 to 2 (-48 points). Your end-of-session state is worse than your start — look at the chart for where the drop happened.
